title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: Which measure considers both the portfolio's returns and its residual...
summary: Analyze a portfolio management concept related to Active Management and Performance Measurement.
prompt: Which measure considers both the portfolio's returns and its residual risk in its calculation?

options.text: The Information Ratio assesses the portfolio's excess return relative to its

solution: The Information Ratio assesses the portfolio's excess return relative to its tracking error (residual risk).
